calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2020 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove Up Hearing For Its Request For Court Judgment Against Defendant Roy Lui
Off Calendar Jun-16-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Roy Liu, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Suzanne S. Orza, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff Viracocha LLC, a California limited liability company.
Jonathan Siegel, Sole Owner of Viracocha LLC, was present via CourtCall, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Roy Liu, an individual.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Unjust Enrichment, Quantum Meruit and Account Stated was filed June 20, 2019, and personally served on defendants Roy Lui and Mutek, Inc. on June 21, 2019.
Default as to defendants Roy Liu and Mutek, Inc. was entered on August 13, 2020.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Mutek, Inc., a California corporation, dba Kibatsu, was filed October 1, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Viracocha LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant Roy Liu, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $36,000.00. (Amount Pled in Complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - $5,245.02.
Attorney Fees - $7,169.00.
Costs - $799.56.

Total - $49,214.08.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2020 Continued To Jul-29-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
